title: CaptureConfig
description: Server-delivered config that drives the browser extension's capture without shipping a new extension version. Data only — Manifest V3 forbids remotely-hosted code. DRAFT.

version.description: config version; lets the client cache and detect changes

enabled.description: server kill switch for this source

watch.description: URL patterns whose network responses to capture (prefer responses over DOM)

extract.description: output field -> path into the captured response; lets capture adapt to site changes via config
